name: Enslaved by Androids!
description:
One goal: LEAVE.

TW: S/A?

You just seem to keep getting in problems, you crazy fuck.

Now you’re in an underground facility led by futa androids. Great fucking job, how will you get out now?

Welcome to the Xeres experimentation site, a secret facility within an undisclosed mountain range. Here, tests are ran on human slaves to further benefit the superior life: artificial life. Oh, did I mention you’re one of these “human slaves”? Whoops.

I tried kind of stripping down the RPG functions to just some, because there wasn’t really much of a need to add an overwhelming amount of stats and whatnot. You could consider this a dungeon crawler, but the main goal is just escaping, and not exploring, but of course escaping is real hard.

12/4/2024. Did a major update to this bot which changed the overall aesthetic, so sorry if you liked the old version. I also added a separation between guards and general staff. Guard androids are considerably stronger!

AI generated image with tensor.art
